core_philosophy: Precision, raw performance, 'closer to the metal'. Matte dark surfaces, 1px solid borders, mono-spaced data points, high-contrast text.

rules.headings: Tracking-tight, bold to black weights, never Inter.
rules.body: Clean, highly legible, moderate line height (leading-relaxed for paragraphs).
rules.mono: Used strictly for DOM selectors, code blocks, framework tabs, and numeric counters (timer/steps).

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Dense for app surfaces (Control Room), Generous for marketing (Swiss Grid).
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: MODE B (Control Room): Tight gaps (gap-px or gap-4). Every pixel utilized. H-full on children.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: MODE A (Tetris Grid): Wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Asymmetry, bento boxes with empty cells.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use grid borders (`border-r border-b border-zinc-800`).
spacing_and_layout.radii: Minimal. `rounded-none` or `rounded-md` (4px to 6px max). No pill shapes unless it's a specific status badge.

component_strategy.general: Do not use standard Vercel/Stripe look. Use 'Grid Borders' and 'Terminal' micro-themes.
component_strategy.buttons: Flat, 1px border. Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Secondary: bg-transparent border-zinc-700 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800.
component_strategy.cards: Cardless approach preferred in dashboard. Use 1px border-zinc-800 with bg-[#0A0A0A]. For elevated popups, use bg-[#121212] with shadow-xl.
component_strategy.inputs: Shadcn based. bg-transparent, border-zinc-800, focus:border-zinc-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-500.
component_strategy.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (Duotone for marketing, Regular/Fill for app) or Lucide-react.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp transitions. Text must turn bright white on hover. Borders lighten to zinc-600.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use mono-spaced text 'LOADING...' or simple ASCII/geometric spinners. No soft generic spinners.
motion_and_interactions.timeline: Staggered fade-up (Framer Motion) for newly recorded steps.

marketing_landing.hero: Massive Outfit typography. Overlay hero image with `bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0A0A] via-[#0A0A0A]/80 to-transparent`.
marketing_landing.feature_grid: Bento box style with 'Tracing Beam' border effect on hover.
marketing_landing.comparison_table: Technical grid, monospace headers, high contrast checkmarks.

dashboard_app.layout: Full screen (h-screen). Fixed left sidebar (History/Sessions). Main view split: Left 40% (Timeline), Right 60% (Code & Inspector).
dashboard_app.action_timeline: Vertical scroll. Cards have left-border colored by action type (Blue=Click, Green=Assert, Purple=Type).
dashboard_app.code_editor: JetBrains Mono. Syntax highlighted. Tabs for Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, Karate.
dashboard_app.element_inspector: Dense tabular layout showing data-testid, aria, role, css, xpath with 'Stability Score' badges.

extension_popup.header: Compact. Contains 'TestCapture AI' logo, active domain, and Settings cog.
extension_popup.hero_action: Massive, highly clickable 'Record' button with live timer (mono) and step counter.
extension_popup.recent_steps: Miniature version of Action Timeline. Shows last 3 steps captured.

settings_modal.surface: Glassmorphic overlay `bg-black/80`. Modal body `bg-[#121212] border border-zinc-800`.
settings_modal.fields: Anthropic API Key input (masked), Model selection dropdown (Shadcn Select).

hero_background.description: Rows of dark cubes with glowing green lines. Use for landing page hero background with heavy bottom gradient fade.

code_feature.description: Computer code displayed on screen. Use for 'Code Editor' feature block in marketing bento grid.

abstract_tech.description: Abstract cube made of smaller cubes. Use for 'Element Inspector' feature block background.

icons_and_logos.instructions: Use React Icons (SiPlaywright, SiCypress, SiSelenium) or Phosphor icons for framework logos. Do NOT use placeholder text or generic missing images.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Use Text Shadow over background images.
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: All buttons/inputs must have `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-400 focus:outline-none`.
